startPoint.es: Entra en la sala del trono de Menaphos.

items.name: Calculator:Archaeology/Artefacts
items.display: A restored Zarosian artefact (will be lost)

rewards.display: Slayer XP lamp (yields 100,000 experience in Slayer; requires 87 Slayer)
Archaeology XP lamp (yields 100,000 experience in Archaeology; requires 86 Archaeology)

rewards.name: Combat XP lamp (Beneath Scabaras' Sands)
rewards.display: Combat XP lamp (yields 75,000 in the selected combat skill (Attack, Strength, Defence, Constitution, Ranged, Magic, or Necromancy); requires level 75 in the selected skill)

rewards.name: Temple of Isolation
rewards.display: Access to Scabaras' Temple of Isolation and the Elite Profane Scabarites within
A primed keris and the ability to upgrade it to a consecrated keris, rewarding 40,000 Prayer experience when upgrading it. Talk to Scabaras again after the quest to receive it.

text.en: Enter the Golden Palace in Menaphos.
text.es: Entra en el Golden Palace en Menaphos.

text.en: Talk to Pharaoh Osman, Chosen of Tumeken.
text.es: Habla con Pharaoh Osman, Chosen of Tumeken.

text.en: Go across the bridge east of the Menaphos lodestone into Sophanem and talk to the High Priest.
text.es: Cruza el puente al este de la piedra de viaje de Menaphos hacia Sophanem y habla con el High Priest.

text.en: Go to Pollnivneach and talk to Hakeem the Mayor.
text.es: Ve a Pollnivneach y habla con Hakeem the Mayor.

text.en: Go to Nardah and talk to Awusah the Mayor.
text.es: Ve a Nardah y habla con Awusah the Mayor.

text.en: Go to Al Kharid and talk to Emir Ali Mirza in the Al Kharid palace.
text.es: Ve a Al Kharid y habla con Emir Ali Mirza en el Al Kharid palace.

text.en: Enter the Golden Palace in Menaphos.
text.es: Entra en el Golden Palace en Menaphos.

text.en: Kill the 4 Profane Scabarites and burst the 4 corrupted scarabs nearby.
text.es: Mata a los 4 Profane Scabarites y revienta los 4 corrupted scarabs cercanos.

text.en: Head down the steps near the Menaphos lodestone and kill the 4 Profane Scabarites and burst the 4 corrupted scarabs.
text.es: Baja las escaleras cerca de la piedra de viaje de Menaphos y mata a los 4 Profane Scabarites y revienta los 4 corrupted scarabs.

text.en: The Profane Scabarites and corrupted scarabs from the previous step must be dealt with for the ones on the lower level to spawn.
text.es: Hay que acabar con los Profane Scabarites y corrupted scarabs del paso anterior para que aparezcan los del nivel inferior.

text.en: Head back up to the palace and talk to Commander Akhomet.
text.es: Regresa al palacio y habla con Commander Akhomet.

text.en: Enter the Golden Palace and talk to Pharaoh Osman, Chosen of Tumeken.
text.es: Entra en el Golden Palace y habla con Pharaoh Osman, Chosen of Tumeken.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Enter the Grand Library.
text.es: Entra en la Grand Library.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Talk to Kohnen's assistant. You do not need to follow the assistant, and can just run ahead to Leela and Maisa who are in the south-western corner (down two levels, yellow dot on the minimap).
text.es: Habla con el assistant de Kohnen. No necesitas seguir al assistant, puedes correr directamente hacia Leela y Maisa, que están en la esquina suroeste (dos niveles más abajo, punto amarillo en el minimapa).

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Talk to Leela or Maisa.
text.es: Habla con Leela o Maisa.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Search the nearby bookcases until you obtain The Shiny Scarab.
text.es: Registra las estanterías cercanas hasta obtener The Shiny Scarab.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: The location can be different for each player.
text.es: La ubicación puede variar para cada jugador.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Talk to Leela or Maisa again.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con Leela o Maisa.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Enter the Uzer Mastaba.
text.es: Entra en la Uzer Mastaba.

chatOptions: 1 Head directly to the Pharaoh Queen.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: You may use fairy ring DLQ.
text.es: Puedes usar el fairy ring DLQ.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Talk to Senliten.
text.es: Habla con Senliten.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Talk to Lead Archaeologist Kerner in the ruins of Uzer.
text.es: Habla con Lead Archaeologist Kerner en las ruinas de Uzer.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Talk to Lead Archaeologist Kerner again.
text.es: Vuelve a hablar con Lead Archaeologist Kerner.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Gather scorched sand from any of the nearby locations. Continue screening the sand with the screening tray until you have 30 Kharidian gold and 2 ancient rubies.
text.es: Recoge scorched sand de cualquiera de las ubicaciones cercanas. Sigue tamizando la arena con la screening tray hasta conseguir 30 Kharidian gold y 2 ancient rubies.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Restore the damaged golden scarab with the nearby archaeologist's workbench.
text.es: Repara el damaged golden scarab en la mesa de trabajo del arqueólogo cercana.

steps.section: The hunt for the golden scarab

text.en: Return and enter the Golden Palace
text.es: Regresa y entra en el Golden Palace.

steps.caption: Only follow going up first two stairs...the last set you need to make it go up the stairs as far as it will go on the right edge. Then back down the stairs once, push towards the middle....THEN back up the stairs

text.en: Talk to Pharaoh Osman, Chosen of Tumeken.
text.es: Habla con Pharaoh Osman, Chosen of Tumeken.

text.en: Talk to Leela just outside the northern gates of Menaphos.
text.es: Habla con Leela justo fuera de las puertas norte de Menaphos.

text.en: Release the golden scarab.
text.es: Libera el golden scarab.

text.en: Follow the golden scarab at the locations indicated on the map on the right until you reach the Scabarite Cavern.
text.es: Sigue al golden scarab por las ubicaciones indicadas en el mapa de la derecha hasta llegar a la Scabarite Cavern.

text.en: Teleporting directly to the cavern will not work.
text.es: Teletransportarte directamente a la cueva no funcionará.

text.en: Don't miss the final golden scarab spot directly in front of the cavern. Doing so will cause you to have to repeat the entire path from Menaphos.
text.es: No te pierdas el último punto del golden scarab justo frente a la cueva. Si lo haces, tendrás que repetir todo el recorrido desde Menaphos.

text.en: Enter the cave entrance.
text.es: Entra en la entrada de la cueva.

text.en: Head south and follow the golden scarab once more.
text.es: Dirígete al sur y sigue al golden scarab una vez más.

text.en: Scavenge the piles of debris in the cavern until you have five sets of boat materials. If a Profane Scabarite appears, it must be killed to obtain the materials. Teleporting out will result in loss of materials.
text.es: Rebusca en los montones de escombros de la cueva hasta conseguir cinco sets de boat materials. Si aparece un Profane Scabarite, deberás matarlo para obtener los materiales. Teletransportarte fuera hará que pierdas los materiales.

text.en: Repair the old boat.
text.es: Repara el old boat.

text.en: Travel with the old boat.
text.es: Viaja con el old boat.

text.en: Head east and up the steps and talk to Scabaras.
text.es: Dirígete al este, sube las escaleras y habla con Scabaras.

text.en: Go back down the steps and interact with Fear. You need to keep interacting with Fear to scare it up the steps to Scabaras. Guide it up the northern side of the steps as it is more likely to get stuck on the southern side.
text.es: Baja de nuevo las escaleras e interactúa con Fear. Debes seguir interactuando con Fear para asustarlo y hacer que suba las escaleras hasta Scabaras. Guíalo por el lado norte de las escaleras, ya que es más probable que se atasque en el lado sur.

text.en: Only use the guide going up the first two stairs, after that, it is not accurate!
text.es: Solo usa la guía al subir los dos primeros tramos de escaleras; después de eso, ¡ya no es precisa!

text.en: Go through all options during the flashback. Scabaras will expect a specific response to each of his three statements, and the order is random for each player.
text.es: Recorre todas las opciones durante el flashback. Scabaras esperará una respuesta específica a cada una de sus tres afirmaciones, y el orden es aleatorio para cada jugador.

text.en: "Mention of his children would have given him pause."
text.es: "Mention of his children would have given him pause."

chatOptions: 3 Amascut and Icthlarin are not ready.

text.en: "What if we had proposed an alternative?"
text.es: "What if we had proposed an alternative?"

chatOptions: 1 There has to be another way.

text.en: "What would Lady Elidinis have thought?"
text.es: "What would Lady Elidinis have thought?"

chatOptions: 2 What insight has Lady Elidinis provided?

text.en: Following the cutscene, continue through the dialogue.
text.es: Tras la escena, continúa con el diálogo.

text.en: Interact with Ego at the bottom of the steps.
text.es: Interactúa con Ego al pie de las escaleras.

text.en: Pick from a cavern dwellberry bush near the old boat. Filling your backpack with several is helpful, but only one cavern dwellberry is needed if you're picking it back up just after dropping them in the next step.
text.es: Recoge de un cavern dwellberry bush cerca del old boat. Es útil llenar tu inventario con varias, pero solo necesitas una cavern dwellberry si vas a recogerla justo después de soltarla en el siguiente paso.

text.en: Drop the cavern dwellberries to lure Ego up the steps.
text.es: Suelta las cavern dwellberries para atraer a Ego escaleras arriba.

text.en: Ego can only be lured within five game squares.
text.es: A Ego solo se le puede atraer dentro de cinco casillas de juego.

text.en: Go through all options during the second flashback.
text.es: Recorre todas las opciones durante el segundo flashback.

text.en: "Taking a firmer stance against her transgression may have dissuaded her."
text.es: "Taking a firmer stance against her transgression may have dissuaded her."

text.en: "What if we had challenged her perspective?"
text.es: "What if we had challenged her perspective?"

chatOptions: 2 Your father sought to protect you.

text.en: "What if we had placated her?"
text.es: "What if we had placated her?"

text.en: Following the cutscene, continue through the dialogue.
text.es: Tras la escena, continúa con el diálogo.

text.en: Interact with Melancholy at the bottom of the steps and use the chat options to motivate the scarab to make it move up the steps repeatedly. Go through all chat options until it moves from each stop.
text.es: Interactúa con Melancholy al pie de las escaleras y utiliza las opciones de chat para motivar al scarab repetidamente y hacer que suba las escaleras. Recorre todas las opciones de chat hasta que avance en cada parada.

text.en: After the third flashback, head down the steps to find Grief.
text.es: Después del tercer flashback, baja las escaleras para encontrar a Grief.

text.en: Grief appears as a red dot on the minimap.
text.es: Grief aparece como un punto rojo en el minimapa.

text.en: Keep stamping out Grief until it transforms into a level 146 monster.
text.es: Sigue pisoteando a Grief hasta que se transforme en un monstruo de nivel 146.

text.en: Defeat the monster.
text.es: Derrota al monstruo.

text.en: Talk to Scabaras.
text.es: Habla con Scabaras.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
